name: trulens-eval

metadata.name: trulens-eval
metadata.summary: Backwards-compatibility package for API of trulens_eval<1.0.0 using API of trulens-*>=1.0.0.

documentation: # trulens-eval

documentation:
!!! warning
    This module is deprecated and will be removed. Use `trulens.core.app.base`,
    `trulens.apps.langchain.langchain`, or
    `trulens.apps.llamaindex.llama` instead.
ruff: noqa: E402, F401

classes.name: trulens_eval.utils.python.SingletonInfo

methods.name: trulens_eval.utils.python.SingletonInfo.warning
documentation: Issue warning that this singleton already exists.

class_variables.name: trulens_eval.utils.python.SingletonInfo.val
documentation: The singleton instance.

class_variables.name: trulens_eval.utils.python.SingletonInfo.cls
documentation: The class of the singleton instance.

class_variables.name: trulens_eval.utils.python.SingletonInfo.frameinfo_codeline
documentation:
The frame where the singleton was created.

This is used for showing "already created" warnings. This is intentionally
not the frame itself but a rendering of it to avoid maintaining references
to frames and all of the things a frame holds onto.

class_variables.name: trulens_eval.utils.python.SingletonInfo.name
documentation:
The name of the singleton instance.

This is used for the SingletonPerName mechanism to have a separate singleton
for each unique name (and class).
Information about a singleton instance.

classes.name: trulens_eval.utils.python.SingletonPerName

methods.name: trulens_eval.utils.python.SingletonPerName.warning
documentation: Issue warning that this singleton already exists.

methods.name: trulens_eval.utils.python.SingletonPerName.__new__
documentation: Create the singleton instance if it doesn't already exist and return it.

methods.name: trulens_eval.utils.python.SingletonPerName.delete_singleton_by_name
documentation:
Delete the singleton instance with the given name.

This can be used for testing to create another singleton.

Args:
    name: The name of the singleton instance to delete.

    cls: The class of the singleton instance to delete. If not given, all
        instances with the given name are deleted.

methods.name: trulens_eval.utils.python.SingletonPerName.delete_singleton
documentation:
Delete the singleton instance. Can be used for testing to create another
singleton.

Class for creating singleton instances except there being one instance max,
there is one max per different `name` argument. If `name` is never given,
reverts to normal singleton behavior.
